use_cases: Primary call-to-action triggers in forms and pages
Icon-only action buttons in toolbars and navigation
Destructive action confirmations with visual distinction
Ghost-style secondary actions for minimal UI
Link-style inline navigation with button behavior
ai_summary: A shadcn-style action button component with multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition support and class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management. Follows shadcn's design system with ring focus states and disabled opacity handling.
